markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.066 — Costs

The board, in a final order under this subchapter, may charge all or part of the costs of processing an application to the parties in the proceedings.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: The board, in a final order under this subchapter, may charge all or part of the costs of processing an application to the parties in the proceedings.
